ddl.value: ("message"."rooms"."type" = 'DirectMessage' AND "message"."rooms"."name" IS NULL) OR ("message"."rooms"."type" = 'Room' AND "message"."rooms"."name" IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM("message"."rooms"."name")) BETWEEN 1 AND 100)
ddl.name: rooms_name_check

ddl.value: ("message"."rooms"."type" = 'DirectMessage' AND "message"."rooms"."participantKey" IS NOT NULL) OR ("message"."rooms"."type" = 'Room' AND "message"."rooms"."participantKey" IS NULL)
ddl.name: participant_key_type
